name: FAIRplex Custom App
description: FAIRplex POC for Verily Workbench: Synapse DRS resolution plus AMP dataset search over a bundled query-node with synthetic data. Workbench platform login replaces FAIRplex auth; the Start session screen prefills the user's Workbench identity via the wb CLI and optionally collects a Synapse personal access token at runtime.

synapse_drs_base_url.description: Base URL of the Synapse GA4GH DRS API used for DRS resolution.

amp_programs.description: Comma-separated AMP programs whose synthetic data is seeded into the bundled query-node database.
